pull.title: test: Check that RPCs do not time out, even under load
pull.body:
It turns out there is no test currently to check that the RPC server does not time out under load. With "load" I mean a flood of trivial payloads. That is, the only work needed is JSON encoding and decoding of (let's say) a block of data of 2 MB or so. This may take a few milliseconds, but should never take more than a few seconds.

So add a test for this.

rename.from: test: Check that RPCs do not time out, even under load
rename.to: test: Check that RPCs do not time out, even under load

events.body: The following sections might be updated with supplementary metadata relevant to reviewers and maintainers. ### Code Coverage & Benchmarks For details see: https://corecheck.dev/bitcoin/bitcoin/pulls/34927. ### Reviews See [the guideline](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#code-review) for information on the review process. | Type | Reviewers | | ---- | --------- | | Concept ACK | [enirox001](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34927#issuecomment-4289366227) | If your review is incorrectly listed, please copy-paste <!--meta-tag:bot-skip--> into the comment that the bot should ignore. ### Conflicts Reviewers, this pull request conflicts with the following ones: * [#35334](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/35334) (test: Allow --usecli in more tests by maflcko) * [#34566](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34566) (feature: Use different datadirs for different signets by ekzyis) If you consider this pull request important, please also help to review the conflicting pull requests. Ideally, start with the one that should be merged first.

Draft for now, because the test fails :(

Edit: It fails in CI, but it passes locally for me:

```
./bld-cmake/test/functional/test_runner.py -j 16 $( printf 'rpc_echo_payload.py %.0s' {1..2000} )
cc @dergoegge Can you copy-paste the Python test into Antithesis to see if it fails there?

rename.from: test: Check that RPCs do not time out, even under load
rename.to: test: Check that RPCs do not time out, even under load. Disable Nagle's

events.body: Can this be tested with 120 commits or so?

rename.from: test: Check that RPCs do not time out, even under load. Disable Nagle's
rename.to: test: Check that RPCs do not time out, even under load

events.body:
> Can this be tested with 120 commits or so?

Sorry, turns out I was wrong, and I spun up a new connection while disabling Nagle's. Obviously spinning up a new connection is already known to work around the issue and Nagle's didn't seem to affect it.
